description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a covered porch with columns, a main entry door, and a double garage with a driveway, where a car is parked. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, with large windows on both floors, especially prominent on the rear and side facades. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved walkway and driveway, surrounded by a green lawn. The rear of the house has multiple tall windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional, open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a covered front porch, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch, double garage, driveway, and a car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a car, with visible upper floor windows and siding details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple tall windows and the clean, flat lines of the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall of the garage and the paved walkway leading to the entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and minimal decorative elements
